titleStmt.title: SII 34.410: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 410. Aruppukkōṭṭai, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Sundarēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is also said to be an order of Chōḻagaṅgadēvaṉ (alias Aruḷāḷaṉ Aḻagaṉ) mentioned in the above inscription. It is addressed to a Śivabrāhmaṇa of the Kuṟaḷmāṇīśvaram temple, who purchased and donated 4 mā and odd of land to the shrine of Eḍuttaduvaliyapiḷḷaiyār. The land was to be the dēvadāna of the shrine and the kārāṇmai-kāṇi of the land to be enjoyed by a guhai (same as maṭha).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cOḻakaṅka tEva Olai veṇpuḷaṉāṭ
ṭuc ceṅkāṭṭirukkai Iṭattuveḷi Uṭaiyār kuṟa
ḷ māṇīśvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉār kōyil civappirāma
ṇaril Aḻakaṉ Uṭaiya pirāṉakku nāyiṉār Emmaṇṭala
muṅ koṇṭaruḷiya kulaicēkara tēvaṟkup patiṉeṭ
ṭāvatu kāttikaimātam Ivvūṟ pūvalōka ka
pēr Aḻakiya perumāḷeṉṉum maṭaiyāl nila
m patiṉāṟaṭikkōlāl Irunūṟṟaimpattāṟu kuḻi
koṇṭatu Orumāvāka kumpaṉūr muttaraiyaṉ ni
lam Irumāvarai muntirikaiyum tuvaḷikaṅ
kannilam Araimāviṉ kīḻ mūṉṟumā mukkā
ṇiyum Aruviṭṭa cokkaṉ nilamukkāṇi A
raikkāṇiyum teṉṉilaṅkai nāṭāḷvāṉ nilam mu
kkālē kāṇiyum
maṭavār muttaraiyaṉ kaṉalum kiṇaṟum nilam A
raikkāṇiyum Āka nilam ṉālumāvaraik
kāṇiyum kiṇaṟum Ivvūril Eṭuttatu valiya pi
ḷḷaiyāṟku Ivvāṇṭu mutal tēvatāṉamāka
vum kukaikkuk kārāṇmaik kāṇiyāka
vum Iṉṉilam payirpāttu payiṟkaṇ
ṭa nilattukku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷi
ṭṭa veñcaṉatukku Ūṟkāllāl mukka
la nellu Iṟukkakkaṭava coṉ
ṉōm Ippaṭikku Ivvōlai piṭipā
ṭākak koṇṭu cantirātittarvaṟkku celva
tāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik ko
ḷka Aruḷāḷaṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa cōḻakaṅka
tēvaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aticeya pāṇṭi
yañ cētirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irāca
nārāyaṇa pirāmamārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Innilattukku cūḻellai
ṟā kīḻellai teṟku no
kkippōṉa vāykkā
lukku mēṟkum teṉ E
llai Aruvicok
kaṉ nilam Aḷavu Akap
paṭṭa nilattukku teṉva
rampukku vaṭakkum mē
lellai teṉṉila
laṅkai nāṭāḻvāṉ
vayalukku kiḻakkum Iva
ṉ ceyku kiḻakkunō
kki Aḷantavarampukku kiḻa
kku vaṭavellai tiruvuṭai
yāṭṭattukku teṟkum Innā
n kellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nilam
nālumāvaraikkāṇiyum
kiṇaṟum
Ivai veṭṭiṉēṉ cuntara
pāṇṭiyataccaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.410 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
